text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The video begins with a setup screen for a user testing session. Instructions on the screen ask the user to share their window, and a small video feed of the participant is visible in the top right corner.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 0,
    "description": "Initial screen state: Setup page for a user testing session with instructions for screen sharing and a participant video feed.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A dark grey screen with white text providing instructions for screen sharing."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The participant begins typing the main task description into the text area on the screen.",
    "type": "input_text",
    "time_start_ms": 1050,
    "time_end_ms": 29100,
    "description": "Participant types the main task instructions: \"Perfect! Here's your task: Now I'm going to show you a prototype with new filtering features... any confusion or friction you experience is valuable feedback!\"",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The participant is typing a long paragraph of text into the central area of the screen."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After a brief pause, the participant types more instructions regarding the 'think aloud' protocol.",
    "type": "input_text",
    "time_start_ms": 29150,
    "time_end_ms": 37500,
    "description": "Participant types additional instructions: \"Please think aloud as you work through this... Let me know when you feel like you've completed the task.\"",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "More text is being added to the instruction block on screen."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The participant types final instructions explaining how to access the prototype via the button that will appear.",
    "type": "input_text",
    "time_start_ms": 37800,
    "time_end_ms": 43150,
    "description": "Participant types instructions for accessing the prototype: \"I'm going to open the website in your browser now. If you don't see the website, click the button below to open it.\"",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The final lines of instruction are typed into the text area."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Immediately after the typing is finished, an 'Open' button appears below the text block.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 44150,
    "time_end_ms": 44150,
    "description": "An 'Open' button appears on the screen below the typed instructions.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A blue 'Open' button is now visible in the center of the screen."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The participant moves the cursor to the 'Open' button and clicks it to proceed to the prototype.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 45400,
    "time_end_ms": 45400,
    "description": "Participant clicks the 'Open' button to launch the prototype.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Open",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button as it is clicked."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After clicking the button, the screen transitions to a white loading state as the prototype begins to load.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 45400,
    "time_end_ms": 47750,
    "description": "The screen transitions to a white loading state after the 'Open' button is clicked.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The screen is entirely white during the transition."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The prototype finishes loading, revealing the 'Explore' page of the application.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 47750,
    "time_end_ms": 47750,
    "description": "The prototype loads the 'Explore' page, showing various tasks and surveys.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_title": "Explore",
    "frame_description": "The 'Explore' page of a mobile app is displayed, featuring cards for 'Short tasks & surveys' and 'Sessions to schedule'."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user begins scrolling down the list of tasks on the Explore page. Optical flow data confirms a scroll action starting at 47s.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 47750,
    "time_end_ms": 49500,
    "description": "User scrolls down the 'Explore' page to view more task listings.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The list of tasks on the Explore page moves upwards as the user scrolls."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user performs another scroll action to move further down the page.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 52100,
    "time_end_ms": 53500,
    "description": "User scrolls down to reveal more task cards, including 'Diary Study'.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The page content shifts as the user scrolls down."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The cursor pauses over the 'Video Call' task card. Cursor tracking data confirms the cursor is stationary at (1313.7, 511.3) for several hundred milliseconds.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 55233,
    "time_end_ms": 55933,
    "description": "Cursor hovers over the 'Video Call' task card.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Video Call",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is stationary over a pink card labeled 'Video Call'."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The cursor briefly pauses over the 'In Person' task card. Cursor tracking data confirms the cursor is stationary at (1412.8, 668.5).",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 58300,
    "time_end_ms": 58566,
    "description": "Cursor hovers over the 'In Person' task card.",
    "confidence": 0.8,

    "frame_description": "The cursor is stationary over a light pink card labeled 'In Person'."
  },

    "type": "scroll",

    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The page content moves as the user scrolls."

  {
    "thinking": "A final scroll action is detected towards the end of the segment. Optical flow data confirms movement between 76s and 78s.",
